Index.title: Learn English and Spanish in a fun way
Index.subtitle: Classes designed for kids and teenagers
Index.paragraph: Interactive, dynamic and personalized lessons adapted to each student’s level.
Index.feat1Desc: Dynamic learning with games and interactive activities.
Index.feat2Desc: Each student learns at their own pace with individual attention.
Index.feat3Desc: Visible improvement in confidence and academic performance.
Index.aboutText1: I am passionate about teaching languages in a fun and close way.
Index.aboutText2: My goal is for kids to learn without fear and enjoy the process.
Index.ctaTitle: Start today with a free class
Index.ctaSubtitle: Discover how your child can learn English or Spanish in a fun and effective way

hero.title: Hi, I'm Miss Espanglish
hero.subtitle: A teacher specialized in fun and effective language learning

story.title: My story
story.p1: I’ve always believed that learning a language shouldn’t be boring or frustrating.
story.p2: That’s why I created a method where kids learn through games, interaction, and confidence from day one.

v1.title: Learning through play
v1.desc: Games and activities make learning natural

v2.title: Confidence first
v2.desc: Students start speaking without fear from day one

v3.title: Dynamic classes
v3.desc: No boring lessons, everything is interactive

hero.title: How we help your child actually learn
hero.subtitle: A proven method combining fun, practice and real progress tracking

process.title: How the classes work
process.subtitle: A clear process adapted to each student

step1.title: We understand their level and needs
step1.description: Every child is different, so we start with a personalized assessment

step2.title: We create a tailored plan
step2.description: Lessons designed around their pace, goals, and learning style

step3.title: They learn by playing and speaking
step3.description: Interactive classes where they participate, have fun, and build confidence

step4.title: We track their progress
step4.description: We measure real improvement and adjust to keep them moving forward

step5.title: Visible results
step5.description: More confidence, better level, and motivation to keep learning

b1.title: More confidence
b1.desc: Students lose the fear of speaking
